Report on Producers and Handlers of Organic Agricultural Products, , , related to report on producers and handlers of organic agricultural products, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. L. 107–171, title VII, § 7409116 Stat. 461Pub. L. 113–79, title VII, § 7408(a)128 Stat. 898May 13, 2002Feb. 7, 2014

children.heading: Competitive specialized research and extension grants authorized
children.label: a Competitive specialized research and extension grants authorized

children.text: facilitating the development and improvement of organic agriculture production, breeding, and processing methods;
evaluating the potential economic benefits of organic agricultural production and methods to producers, processors, and rural communities;
exploring international trade opportunities for organically grown and processed agricultural commodities;
determining desirable traits for organic commodities;
identifying marketing and policy constraints on the expansion of organic agriculture;

conducting advanced on-farm research and development that emphasizes observation of, experimentation with, and innovation for working organic farms, including research relating to production, marketing, food safety, socioeconomic conditions, and farm business management;
examining optimal conservation, soil health, and environmental outcomes relating to organically produced agricultural products; and
developing new and improved seed varieties that are particularly suited for organic agriculture.

children.heading: Grant types and process, prohibition on construction
children.label: b Grant types and process, prohibition on construction
children.text: Paragraphs (4), (7), (8), and (11)(B) of subsection (b) of shall apply with respect to the making of grants under this section.section 3157 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (3), an entity receiving a grant under subsection (a) shall provide non-Federal matching funds (including funds from an agricultural commodity promotion, research, and information program) equal to not less than the amount of the grant.

children.heading: In-kind support
children.label: 2 In-kind support
children.text: Non-Federal matching funds described in paragraph (1) may include in-kind support.

children.label: A
children.text: the results of the project are of a particular benefit to a specific agricultural commodity, but those results are likely to be applicable to agricultural commodities generally; or

children.label: I
children.text: involves a minor commodity; and

children.label: II
children.text: deals with scientifically important research; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the recipient is unable to satisfy the matching funds requirement.

children.heading: Partnerships encouraged
children.label: d Partnerships encouraged
children.text: Following the completion of a peer review process for grant proposals received under this section, the Secretary may provide a priority to those grant proposals, found in the peer review process to be scientifically meritorious, that involve the cooperation of multiple entities.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: e Funding
children.text: On , and each October 1 thereafter through , out of any funds in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, the Secretary of the Treasury shall transfer $3,000,000 to the Secretary of Agriculture for this section.October 1, 2003October 1, 2007

children.label: A
children.text: $18,000,000 for fiscal year 2009;

children.label: B
children.text: $20,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2010 through 2012;

children.label: C
children.text: $20,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2018; and1So in original. The word “and” probably should not appear.1

children.label: D
children.text: $20,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2020;

children.label: E
children.text: $25,000,000 for fiscal year 2021;

children.label: F
children.text: $30,000,000 for fiscal year 2022; and

children.label: G
children.text: $50,000,000 for fiscal year 2023 and each fiscal year thereafter.

children.heading: Discretionary funding
children.label: 2 Discretionary funding
children.text: In addition to amounts made available under paragraph (1), there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $25,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2023.

children.heading: Fiscal year 2013
children.label: 3 Fiscal year 2013
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $25,000,000 for fiscal year 2013.
